The foundational idea behind the ?????-???????? ?????? ???????? (????) is "Sparse Trees, Dense Lists". This format achieves its efficiency by combining YAML-like indentation for nested objects (the "sparse trees") with a compact, CSV-style tabular layout for uniform arrays (the "dense lists").

This design helps eliminate the repetitive keys and braces of JSON, leading to a token reduction of approximately 30?60% for uniform data sets, which directly cuts API costs in LLM and RAG workflows.
